stemHtml: At FL350, you receive a TCAS RA "Descend, descend" and begin descending. Simultaneously, ATC instructs "Climb immediately". What should you do?

options.a: Level off and request clarification: "TCAS RA. Confirm climb."
options.b: Comply with ATC and adjust to climb, confirming "climb immediately."
options.c: Continue descent and reply "Standby, TCAS descent."
options.d: Continue descending and tell ATC "Unable, TCAS RA."
